evidence_titles: Firsthand: How I Bet On Clay (And It Bet On Me) I joined Clay as one of its earliest employees and a reluctant marketing hire. This is how, over the last three years, we built a role around my strengths as a storyteller, scaled past $100M ARR, and created a brand that startups study.

Guideline's Path to Product-Market Fit — The Early Decisions That Powered Its Acquisition by Gusto Ten years after shaking up the retirement fund industry for SMBs, Guideline has been acquired by Gusto. Here, co-founder Kevin Busque shares the early-stage decisions and pivots that put the startup on the path to success.
